title: St. Louis Park educator David Davis is 2026 Minnesota Teacher of the Year
summary_en: David Davis, an instrumental and general music teacher at Park Spanish Immersion Elementary in the St. Louis Park school district, is the 2026 Minnesota Teacher of the Year.
title_cn: 圣路易斯帕克教育工作者戴维·戴维斯获评2026年度明尼苏达州教师

title: 2026 Teacher of the Year to be named Sunday
summary_en: The new Minnesota Teacher of the Year will be named this Sunday, May 3. The Saint Paul RiverCentre hosts this year’s Teacher of the Year event.
title_cn: 2026年度教师人选将于周日揭晓
